mapper.select: select t.partner_member_id as partnerMemberId, m.name as partnerName, m.nickname as partnerNickname, m.profile_image_url as partnerProfileImageUrl, t.last_message as lastMessage, t.last_message_at as lastMessageAt, t.unread_count as unreadCount from ( select case when sender_id = #{memberId} then receiver_id else sender_id end as partner_member_id, date_format(max(created_at), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') as last_message_at, sum(case when receiver_id = #{memberId} and is_read = 0 then 1 else 0 end) as unread_count, substring_index( group_concat(content order by created_at desc, chat_id desc separator '|||'), '|||', 1 ) as last_message from chat_tbl where (sender_id = #{memberId} or receiver_id = #{memberId}) and deleted_yn = 0 group by case when sender_id = #{memberId} then receiver_id else sender_id end ) t join members m on m.member_id = t.partner_member_id order by t.last_message_at desc, t.partner_member_id desc

select chat_id as chatId, sender_id as senderId, receiver_id as receiverId, content, is_read as isRead, date_format(created_at, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') as createdAt, deleted_yn as deletedYn from chat_tbl where deleted_yn = 0 and ( (sender_id = #{memberId} and receiver_id = #{partnerId}) or (sender_id = #{partnerId} and receiver_id = #{memberId}) ) order by created_at asc, chat_id asc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_tbl ( sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{isRead}, 0), 0 )
